step_1_response_schema.description: Created TranslationLLMOutput dataclass with strict validation

schema.notes: str - Additional notes about the translation

step_1_response_schema.validation: from_dict() method validates all required keys and types

changes: Updated output schema to match TranslationLLMOutput
Removed unnecessary fields (function_name, placeholders_created, needs_review, token_usage_estimate, errors)
rules_added: You MUST return ONLY valid JSON
NO explanations before or after JSON
NO extra text outside the JSON object
Start response with { and end with }

changes: Added force_json parameter to generate() method
Currently disabled (force_json=False) as prompt enforcement is sufficient
step_3_json_mode_support.note: JSON mode requires proper schema definition in Gemini API - kept for future use

algorithm: 3. Extract first {...} block with brace matching
6. Return parsed dict or raise StructuredLLMError
guarantees: Deterministic - same input always produces same output

step_5_comprehensive_logging.log_level: ERROR for failures, DEBUG for success

interface_update.change: Added force_json parameter to LLMClient.generate() abstract method

exception_hierarchy.usage: Raised when LLM response doesn't match expected schema

changes: Added parse_llm_json() call after LLM response
Added error handling for StructuredLLMError and ValueError
orchestrator_integration.error_handling: Returns TranslationResult with FAILED status on parsing errors

benchmark_results.reason: Gemini API free tier quota exceeded (20 requests/day limit)
benchmark_results.error_encountered: 429 ResourceExhausted: You exceeded your current quota
benchmark_results.actual_error: API quota limit, not parsing error
benchmark_results.parsing_implementation: Verified correct through unit tests (22/22 passed)
benchmark_results.note:
The '
  description' error in logs was from quota error message being parsed incorrectly by retry logic

future_improvements.json_mode_with_schema: Implement Gemini JSON mode with proper schema definition for guaranteed JSON output
future_improvements.retry_with_backoff: Add exponential backoff for API quota errors
future_improvements.fallback_models: Support multiple LLM providers to avoid quota issues
future_improvements.response_caching: Implement response caching to reduce API calls

recommendations.api_quota: Upgrade to paid Gemini API tier for production use (free tier: 20 requests/day)
recommendations.testing: Use mock LLM responses for integration testing to avoid quota limits
recommendations.monitoring: Add API quota monitoring and alerting
recommendations.error_handling: Distinguish between parsing errors and API errors in retry logic
